shots.match_reason: section b-roll
shots.narration_at_output_time: The Florida Everglades stretch across millions of acres of slow moving water and dense sawgrass.

shots.match_reason: topic=everglades score=42.5 visual=Everglades landscape and invasive predator introduction
shots.narration_at_output_time: But right now, a massive predator is moving just beneath the surface.

shots.match_reason: topic=everglades score=26.0 visual=Everglades landscape and invasive predator introduction

shots.match_reason: topic=pet_trade score=32.0 visual=Miami exotic pet trade and illegal releases

shots.match_reason: topic=hurricane score=41.0 visual=Hurricane Andrew 1992 and breeding facility breach
shots.narration_at_output_time: For years, researchers dismissed sightings as isolated incidents, but by the year 2000,
